title: thymus magnus
intro: Thymus magnus, also known as Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. The medicinal properties of Thymus magnus include its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. Thymus magnus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for medicinal use.
